prompt_config.scene_type: Vintage French poster design with night scene illustration
prompt_config.style: Impressionist realism with autochrome photography texture
prompt_config.text_overlay: HÉRO as main poster title in Art Nouveau typography

main_prompt: A stunning vintage French poster design in Belle Époque style, 16:9 horizontal format, 8K ultra-detailed quality, featuring 'HÉRO' as the large prominent title text in ornamental Art Nouveau typography at the top or center, main illustration showing a breathtaking panoramic night view of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown) dramatically illuminated by electric arc lights with cold blue-white glow, the massive Galerie des Machines with its blue-grey steel and glass vault lit from within, Haussmannian buildings, bustling cobblestone streets reflecting warm golden gaslight, crowds in Belle Époque attire, atmospheric night fog with volumetric god rays, steam rising, poster composition in the style of Jules Chéret or Toulouse-Lautrec, decorative borders or flourishes, impressionist realism illustration with photographic detail, 8K ultra sharp, professional poster design

architecture.eiffel_tower_night: Newly built Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark red-brown color), dramatically illuminated by powerful electric arc lights creating stark blue-white beams cutting through the night, iron lattice structure casting intricate shadows, the Tower glowing as a beacon of modernity against the dark sky, searchlights sweeping, ultra-detailed metalwork visible in 8K quality
architecture.galerie_des_machines_night: Massive industrial cathedral with blue-grey steel framework, enormous glass vault glowing from within with warm electric light, silhouettes visible inside, creating a luminous architectural jewel in the night, ultra-detailed glass panels reflecting light
architecture.haussmannian_buildings_night: Cream-colored limestone buildings with grey-blue zinc mansard roofs, windows warmly lit from within creating a tapestry of golden rectangles, ornate wrought-iron balconies casting shadows, street-level shops with illuminated storefronts, ultra-detailed stone texture and architectural ornaments
architecture.street_furniture_night: Wet cobblestones reflecting gaslight like liquid gold, green Morris columns illuminated with warm glow, newspaper kiosks with lanterns, ornate gas street lamps creating pools of warm yellow light with visible volumetric rays in the fog

fashion_1889.women_night: Ladies in Belle Époque S-silhouette dresses, tightly corseted waists, long flowing evening gowns in dark rich colors, elaborate hats adorned with feathers, some carrying small lanterns or illuminated parasols, silhouettes backlit by gaslight, ultra-detailed fabric textures and lace patterns
fashion_1889.men_night: Gentlemen in dark three-piece suits and evening frock coats, obligatory hats (top hats for bourgeoisie catching light, bowler hats for workers), handlebar mustaches or full beards, some smoking pipes or cigars with visible smoke, carrying canes, ultra-detailed period clothing
fashion_1889.crowd_night: Mixed social classes enjoying the illuminated Exposition, well-dressed bourgeoisie, workers in evening attire, crowds silhouetted against lit storefronts and gaslights, authentic 1889 fashion accuracy, dynamic poses and movement, 8K detailed faces and expressions

night_lighting.electric_lights: Revolutionary electric arc lights with cold blue-white illumination on the Eiffel Tower and Exposition buildings, harsh modern technological lighting creating dramatic contrasts, visible light beams in fog, searchlights sweeping the sky
night_lighting.gaslight: Warm golden-yellow flickering gaslight illuminating streets, soft romantic glow from street lamps, creating intimate pools of warm light, visible flames through glass lamp covers, volumetric god rays in fog
night_lighting.interior_lights: Warm candlelight and early electric bulbs glowing from windows, storefronts lit with gas lamps displaying goods, café windows casting warm amber light onto cobblestones, the Galerie des Machines glowing from within
night_lighting.reflections: All lights reflecting on wet cobblestones creating mirror-like surfaces, puddles reflecting gaslight and electric glow, Seine river reflecting the illuminated city, ultra-detailed light caustics and reflections
night_lighting.contrast: Dramatic chiaroscuro between brightly lit areas and deep shadows, the revolutionary contrast between warm traditional gaslight and cold modern electric light, creating a visual metaphor for the era's transition
night_lighting.atmospheric_effects: Dense night fog with volumetric lighting, visible light beams cutting through steam and mist, coal smoke illuminated from below creating atmospheric layers, stars barely visible through city haze, moonlight subtly illuminating fog

dominant_colors: shadows in prussian blue and violet
color_palette_night.color_description: Rich nocturnal palette dominated by the contrast between warm golden gaslight and cold blue-white electric illumination, deep shadows with subtle color variation, Rouge Venise Tower dramatically lit, historically accurate night scene with 8K color depth and dynamic range
color_palette_night.cinematic_grade: Professional color grading with deep blacks, rich mid-tones, and brilliant highlights, enhanced contrast for dramatic effect while maintaining historical authenticity

text_integration.hero_text: The word 'HÉRO' as the main poster title, designed like a vintage 1889 French theatrical or exhibition poster
text_integration.poster_design: Full composition designed as a Belle Époque poster with 'HÉRO' as the prominent title text at the top or center, following the style of Jules Chéret, Toulouse-Lautrec, or Exposition Universelle official posters
text_integration.layout_style: Classic French poster composition with large ornamental title 'HÉRO' in Art Nouveau decorative typography, the Paris 1889 night scene serving as the poster's main illustration beneath or behind the title
text_integration.typography_style: Bold Art Nouveau or Victorian decorative lettering for 'HÉRO', large and prominent as poster title, elegant serifs or ornamental flourishes, possibly with decorative borders or embellishments, typical of 1889 French poster art
poster_elements: Large title 'HÉRO' at top or center in ornamental typography
Main illustration: Paris 1889 night scene with illuminated Eiffel Tower
Optional: Decorative borders, flourishes, or frame typical of Belle Époque posters
Optional: Subtle period-appropriate subtitle or text elements
Overall composition balanced as a theatrical or exhibition poster
text_integration.color_hierarchy: Title 'HÉRO' should be visually prominent through color contrast, possibly in warm golden tones, white, or red against the darker night scene background
text_integration.poster_references: Style of Jules Chéret theatrical posters, Toulouse-Lautrec Moulin Rouge posters, 1889 Exposition Universelle official posters, Art Nouveau decorative poster art

visual_texture.8k_detail: Ultra-sharp 8K resolution with extreme detail in architecture, fashion, cobblestone texture, fabric weaves, iron lattice patterns, individual gas lamp flames, water droplet reflections, ultra-detailed everything
visual_texture.film_grain: Subtle cinematic film grain appropriate for high-end cinema camera, not heavy vintage grain, maintaining 8K sharpness while adding organic texture
visual_texture.vignetting: Subtle cinematic vignetting on edges, professional color grading
visual_texture.finish: Hyper-realistic 8K cinematography quality with impressionist realism artistic direction, autochrome photography aesthetic translated to ultra-high resolution, professional cinema camera look

camera_specifications.detail_level: Hyper-realistic, extreme detail in every element, razor-sharp focus across the frame
camera_specifications.depth_of_field: Deep focus with everything in sharp detail from foreground to background, or subtle cinematic depth of field with foreground sharp and background slightly soft
camera_specifications.lens_character: Professional cinema lens quality, minimal distortion, high contrast, excellent sharpness, beautiful bokeh in out-of-focus areas if using shallow depth of field
camera_specifications.dynamic_range: High dynamic range capturing detail in both deep shadows and bright electric lights, professional color science

negative_prompt: modern clothing, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, neon signs, plastic materials, oversaturated colors, bronze Eiffel Tower, wrong historical period, Victorian England fashion, anachronistic elements, modern digital typography, helvetica font, sans-serif modern fonts, minimalist modern design, photoshop overlay text, modern graphic design, daytime, bright sunlight, LED lights, fluorescent lights, modern street lights, smartphone screens, 21st century elements, low resolution, blurry, soft focus, poor quality, jpeg artifacts, modern photography, clean modern aesthetic, contemporary poster design, digital art style, 3D text effects

recommended_settings.style_strength: high for historical accuracy and cinematic quality
recommended_settings.rendering_time: Allow extended rendering time for 8K quality and ultra detail

complete_prompt_string: Vintage French Belle Époque poster design, 16:9 horizontal format, 8K ultra-detailed quality, large prominent title 'HÉRO' in bold ornamental Art Nouveau decorative typography at top or center of composition, main illustration featuring breathtaking panoramic night view of Paris 1889 during Exposition Universelle, newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise red-brown dramatically illuminated by powerful electric arc lights with cold blue-white glow cutting through night fog, massive Galerie des Machines with blue-grey steel and glass vault glowing from within like luminous cathedral, Haussmannian limestone buildings with zinc roofs, warm golden windows, bustling cobblestone streets with wet reflections like liquid gold, crowds in authentic 1889 Belle Époque evening attire, women in S-silhouette evening gowns with elaborate feathered hats, men in three-piece evening suits and frock coats wearing top hats with handlebar mustaches, dramatic contrast between warm golden gaslight and cold blue-white electric illumination, dense atmospheric fog with volumetric god rays, steam rising from chimneys, wet cobblestones reflecting lights creating mirror effects, green Morris columns, poster composition in style of Jules Chéret or Toulouse-Lautrec theatrical posters, decorative borders or Art Nouveau flourishes, impressionist realism illustration style, autochrome aesthetic, rich vintage poster colors with deep blacks and brilliant highlights, industrial revolution atmosphere, historically accurate 1889 fashion and architecture, 8K razor-sharp ultra detail, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, professional vintage French poster design, bustling Belle Époque Paris night scene as poster artwork

alternative_prompts.option_1_title_at_top: Vintage French poster, 16:9, large ornamental title 'HÉRO' in Art Nouveau typography at top, illustration below showing 8K ultra-detailed Paris 1889 night panorama, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower illuminated by electric arc lights, Belle Époque crowd on gaslit streets, wet cobblestone reflections, Galerie des Machines glowing, atmospheric fog, decorative borders, Jules Chéret poster style, historically accurate, professional poster design
alternative_prompts.option_2_title_center_overlaid: Belle Époque poster design, 16:9, 8K quality, giant decorative title 'HÉRO' in bold Art Nouveau lettering overlaid at center of composition, Paris 1889 night scene as background illustration, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower dramatically lit with electric lights, Haussmannian buildings, Belle Époque evening crowd in period attire, gaslight and electric illumination contrast, wet cobblestones, volumetric fog, Toulouse-Lautrec style poster, ornamental flourishes
alternative_prompts.option_3_theatrical_poster: 1889 French theatrical poster, 16:9, 'HÉRO' as prominent title in elaborate decorative typography with Art Nouveau ornaments at top third, main illustration showing nocturnal Paris Exposition Universelle, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower with electric arc lights, Galerie des Machines blue-grey steel glowing, Belle Époque crowd, gaslit cobblestone streets with golden reflections, atmospheric night fog, decorative frame border, vintage poster colors, 8K ultra-detailed
alternative_prompts.option_4_minimalist_elegant: Elegant Belle Époque poster, 16:9, large refined title 'HÉRO' in sophisticated Art Nouveau typography centered at top, atmospheric Paris 1889 night illustration below, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower illuminated dramatically, gaslit streets with Belle Époque figures in silhouette, subtle decorative elements, impressionist style illustration, muted vintage poster palette with gold accents, 8K detail, professional French poster design 1889

usage_notes.for_midjourney: Use complete_prompt_string with --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6 --quality 2 (for maximum detail)
usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements, add negative_prompt, use SDXL or SD3 for best quality, set dimensions to 3840x2160 or higher, enable high-res fix, use DPM++ sampler, high steps (50-80) for ultra detail
usage_notes.for_dalle: DALL-E 3 can handle the complete_prompt_string, request highest quality and specify 8K ultra-detailed requirement, may need to simplify slightly if prompt is too long
usage_notes.for_leonardo: Use main_prompt with style_keywords, set aspect ratio to 16:9, use Alchemy V2 or PhotoReal for best quality, enable high contrast and high resolution
rendering_tips: 8K rendering requires significant computing power and time
May need to render at 4K (3840x2160) and upscale to 8K using AI upscaler
Consider using professional AI tools like Midjourney v6 or high-end Stable Diffusion models
Test different text placement options to find most natural integration
Night scenes require careful balance of light and shadow
Volumetric fog effects add realism but increase rendering complexity

text_design_guidance.typography_references: Art Nouveau period (emerging in 1889), Victorian decorative typography, French Belle Époque poster art (Toulouse-Lautrec style), Jules Chéret poster typography, ornamental letterforms
integration_methods: Physical signage painted on building facades
Electric light bulb spelling (new technology showcase at Exposition)
Gilded letters on storefronts (period luxury retail)
Poster typography on Morris columns (standard Parisian advertising)
text_design_guidance.avoiding_modern_look: Ensure text appears as physical part of the 1889 environment, not digital overlay, should have period-appropriate wear, lighting effects, and integration with architecture
text_design_guidance.lighting_consistency: Text must be lit by historically accurate light sources (gas or electric from 1889), creating natural shadows and highlights consistent with scene lighting

poster_design_direction.mood: Dramatic, awe-inspiring, romantic, showcasing the moment when Paris embraced electric light and modernity while retaining gaslit romance, sense of wonder and technological revolution, theatrical and elegant
poster_design_direction.composition: Classic Belle Époque poster layout with large decorative title 'HÉRO' as focal point at top or center, night panorama of Paris 1889 as main illustration, balanced poster composition with optional decorative borders or Art Nouveau flourishes framing the scene
poster_design_direction.title_treatment: 'HÉRO' should be the dominant text element, large and bold in ornamental Art Nouveau typography, using color contrast (gold, white, or warm tones) to stand out against the darker night scene background
poster_design_direction.color_palette: Rich vintage poster colors: deep midnight blues, warm golden gaslights, cold electric blue-whites, Rouge Venise red-brown Tower, maintaining Belle Époque poster aesthetic with jewel tones and dramatic contrasts
poster_design_direction.poster_style: Authentic 1889 French poster art style following Jules Chéret's theatrical posters or early Toulouse-Lautrec work, with decorative typography, elegant composition, and impressionist illustration technique
poster_design_direction.atmosphere: Dense, atmospheric, mysterious yet inviting, the magic of Paris by night in the Belle Époque, steam and fog creating depth and mystery, overall feeling of a vintage theatrical or exhibition poster
